title: [v4.7] compose: try all possible providers before throwing an error
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #20508

/assign vrothberg

```release-note
Fix a bug in `podman compose` to try all configured providers before throwing an error.
```

comments.body:

It's not, but it's infra-related and we're only maintaining this branch for another 3 weeks, so we'll just ignore it until 4.8 comes out
